game_info.title: Jelly Shifter 3D
game_info.concept:
Jelly Shift – Can you slide through?

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/jelly-shift-obstacle-course/id1467252438

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Jelly Shift – Can you slide through?

► Everybody loves jelly!

Jelly can flow and jelly can crash. Empty your mind. Be formless, shapeless, like jelly! In this fast-moving and enormously fun casual platform game the aim is to guide your lovable jelly to the end of each obstacle course in the shortest possible time. Follow the treats and shift up and down to squeeze your jelly between barriers, under bars, and over runners as smoothly and speedily as you can. Only the slipperiest, slinkiest, slidingest jelly will get all the stars!

► Be like jelly!

· Jelly is infinite! This game offers a huge number of levels, each with an obstacle course to navigate made of unique twists and turns, barriers of all sizes, and a variety of other super-sweet features.

· Jelly just gets better! Great rewards—collect diamonds and complete levels to unlock a host of jelly characters including super-cute animals, colorful heroes, and absolute jelly legends.

· Jelly is cool, but jelly is hot! Successfully pass enough obstacles without crashing, and you’ll get jelly fever, and intense burst of color and speed to get you to the end of the level in half the time.

· The nature of jelly is irrepressible! Fast-moving game mechanics—your jelly will have to adapt if it wants to survive out there. Shift up and down like an F1 driver to save your jelly from bashing its jelly head and bruising its jelly sides, or just slipping away altogether between the runners.

· Jelly has great taste! Glorious colors, cute graphics, fun music and satisfyingly squelchy sound facts make Jelly Shift a wonderful place to be. Slip away from it all into a world of bright jelly joy!

· Jelly is a happy place! Dozens of different environments and 200 obstacle course variations mean you’ll be coming back to Jelly Shift for more and more jelly fun. Let the hours slip away in a riot of jelly joy!

· Jelly just is! Jelly knows no stress or worry, it just slides on, adapting itself to whatever life throws at it. Jelly may crash, but it never stops. It bounces right back and keeps on sliding. And this charming casual game can help teach you to be like jelly!

► Keep on sliding! Download Jelly Shift now and enjoy hours of flexible flowing fun. Be like jelly, my friend!

Subscription Terms:
VIP MEMBERSHIP Access offers a weekly subscription, you will have a 3-days FREE trial period, after this period you will be charged. 
After buying this subscription, you will unlock following features: exclusive VIP characters, no ads, free 250 gems every day, free prize machine roll every day. 
This is an Auto-renewable subscription. The payment is charged to your account after confirmation. The subscription is renewed unless you turn it off 24 hours before the period ends. Your account will be charged for renewal as well.

End of trial and subscription renewal:

• The payment is charged to your account after a confirmation of purchase.
• The subscription is renewed unless you turn it off 24 hour before the end of the current period.
• The account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours before the end of the current period at the cost of the weekly subscription.
• The user may manage the subscription and auto-renewal have to be turned off by going to the user’s account settings after purchase in the Store.
• No cancellation of the current subscription is allowed during the active subscription period.


Canceling a trial or a subscription:

• If you want to cancel a subscription during its free trial, you have to cancel it through your account in the Store. This must be done at least 24 hours before the end of the free trial period to avoid being charged.

For more information, please visit https://support.apple.com/HT207865 for more information


If there is questions contact us info@saygames.by

Privacy Policy and Terms of use : https://saygames.by/privacy-policy-and-terms-of-use/jellyshift

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use
game_info.description: Jelly Shifter 3D is a fast-paced infinite runner where you control a shapeshifting jelly block. The goal is to traverse a procedurally generated obstacle course filled with gates, tunnels, and barriers. You must dynamically alter the shape of your jelly—stretching it tall to pass through narrow gaps, or flattening it wide to slide under low barriers—while maintaining your momentum. Collect glowing energy cubes to boost your score and reach the finish line to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Up / W: Stretch Tall (become thinner)
- Arrow Down / S: Flatten Wide (become shorter)
- Arrow Left / A: Move Left
- Arrow Right / D: Move Right
- Space: Jump (for low obstacles)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (after Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Input Response Test. Verifies that the player entity responds to shape-shifting inputs and lateral movement commands.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will simulate random inputs (Up, Down, Left, Right) every 30 frames. It will log the player's dimensions to ensure they change according to the inputs. Collision with obstacles is ignored or expected to fail eventually.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 500 frames without crashing. Player dimensions (scale.x, scale.y) fluctuate significantly. The game eventually ends in a collision or runs indefinitely if lucky.

TEST_2.test_description: Perfect Play / AI Solver Test. Verifies that the game is winnable by a perfect agent and that collision boxes are accurate.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test controller scans the `gameState.obstacles` array to find the nearest upcoming obstacle. It calculates the required dimensions (height/width) and position to pass through the obstacle's gap and simulates the corresponding inputs (W/S/A/D) to match those targets precisely.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully navigates through all obstacles in the generated level and reaches the finish line, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Start the game, let it run for 60 frames, press ESC to pause. Wait 60 frames (verifying delta time is 0 or game state doesn't advance). Press ESC to resume. Continue play.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game state freezes during pause and resumes seamlessly without time jumps or physics glitches.
TEST_3.strategy: Start the game, let it run for 60 frames, press ESC to pause. Wait 60 frames (verifying delta time is 0 or game state doesn't advance). Press ESC to resume. Continue play.
TEST_3.expected: Game state freezes during pause and resumes seamlessly without time jumps or physics glitches.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Force a game over (lose) state immediately. Press 'R'. Verify all entities are reset, score is 0, and player is at start position. Then press Enter to play again.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game fully resets to initial state without memory leaks or residual objects in the scene.
TEST_4.strategy: Force a game over (lose) state immediately. Press 'R'. Verify all entities are reset, score is 0, and player is at start position. Then press Enter to play again.
TEST_4.expected: Game fully resets to initial state without memory leaks or residual objects in the scene.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Spawn a collectible directly in the player's path. Move player through it. Verify score increases and collectible is removed from the scene.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Score increments by the defined value, and the collectible object is removed from `gameState.collectibles`.
TEST_5.strategy: Spawn a collectible directly in the player's path. Move player through it. Verify score increases and collectible is removed from the scene.
TEST_5.expected: Score increments by the defined value, and the collectible object is removed from `gameState.collectibles`.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Hold 'Left' key continuously. Verify player x-position clamps at the track edge and does not fall off into the void.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Player X position stays within defined track width limits (-TrackWidth/2 to +TrackWidth/2).
TEST_6.strategy: Hold 'Left' key continuously. Verify player x-position clamps at the track edge and does not fall off into the void.
TEST_6.expected: Player X position stays within defined track width limits (-TrackWidth/2 to +TrackWidth/2).

TEST_7.strategy_description: While changing shape, monitor player volume (width * height * depth). Verify it remains approximately constant.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Product of dimensions stays within a small tolerance of the initial volume, ensuring the "jelly" physics feels correct.
TEST_7.strategy: While changing shape, monitor player volume (width * height * depth). Verify it remains approximately constant.
TEST_7.expected: Product of dimensions stays within a small tolerance of the initial volume, ensuring the "jelly" physics feels correct.
